subject: ICYMI: WARNOCK-LED GROUP UNDER INVESTIGATION FOR VOTER FRAUD
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, DECEMBER 1, 2020 ICYMI: WARNOCK-LED GROUP UNDER INVESTIGATION FOR VOTER FRAUD
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, the Secretary of State yesterday [announced](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe4Vj14IJVoQzAkSKrfACBYx4WMYgwsAdZe23mI5ePJKTSwnpX39blf7igrNRxSXTz3jrw8xpKiOIvlIy82J-qKhmOi4UUr6TqwguZojA3ZDtOX5GH7M-WmjBaOFfsoh86VcnFW7-0-EZcJIEE7YrFRcwp2M47sc9djbNA4TyJAR1Pv1k7b2CE0Q1Ttls6xf-HYqJoAvZDylSNPU0w5AnQdng==&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==) an [investigation](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe4Fy_xftCMUW7HhzGt5_D0R4COgL7jVmZQvolYjatETOb-_Li-KjLTyU7Zy_xoB323X_RgsCWbIg_gLZHxRBRUXU8UicLwjlk5T5Ne4Nb_Svb8dNuGCGmndXqJV8m2q_7QyeaITELx2ra4ty_1-ad3OrwXSyK0FsaQAsKA-XiyE5i2lyCb0yTg7MJ0Pqi7cfXPY_Gbv0UrdjbJx8tiINIEUChu9c8doRoBmHGLGKyYPzN6OQdM9NGSww==&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==) into several groups [suspected](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe4YUVaUi6A-G-fjQ738Kt_FDA3Ci349X6jFmikrH_0pBhK7-PHsgr5c9rk5T-9JTSX_TaHhc1ji4iMvlQWW_I5LC6mT7dv5PfKF_DwOxSlqeYjzMOW9RmMuj2avl_rz_N0GPZFztnWwg0NDwFBHkTZHKWrmGPERkWI9Fe7QF0bvfSMPfr6tEMTF37LYtu0y3mj&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==) of voter fraud in the 2020 elections - [including](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe4MYlbDbBrip1NDi6C6008u8eV2wdD6rmd5B6WhYILH42pCRtNr01BPuQyN-Z-0jCeKFBkdtdtZLU1WVCR7bg0aaeQpSRNQXL0RPaYizvOi_q-NSisCGOMH9eglNZxq8TcXVxoQTyPHh6AQb-S4HtlJ9Odr4jV1girwDMMjNoMttQXTs4hiR74bgjorwjqzO9e-KMWKkMwtbQc3E6eEKu8fc0fR5Dtyhut6UWQGiFU324ZfTfUQaVMmditA1KSRrDY&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==) the New Georgia Project, a left-wing organization [formerly led](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe4EfCQaYGYdnCJX5ucCFP9x670r-R3gYrQrswJvpwVTmlBS84YwgbEb6sGPicD6eh1qJUuWxAOAnGqmm9N--ze11U-wzK1qwflNyFzOH5nO25y7wG4Wai6j4FetextUXJrK6lzMY_oKxUJKDYKx0dn7QZWe3ABC4hzBU5c8O67JiszRrSrJl7qk5HiVen7UmY6MjvjtgyIXcOmVlGz5pmSuoF-hsq-Z0hDSkjpG-jQxTymA22KZadOqg==&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==) by Stacey Abrams and Raphael Warnock, who served as its spokesperson and CEO from 2014 to 2020. The group also receives funding from left-wing mega-donor George Soros - who is also backing Raphael Warnock's campaign.
The New Georgia Project is being [investigated](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe46b1k0hln0l0cH4ni3bk0ItlzH799io20kQ6XdUbbvejruNXWP09ydGeRt0bJz888B5tHomZb9PpVKUbGgC8pmlzMJO4HTsjdWGkETZObfsQqedMIXS73_rmjwwXSYmRYKhpNWBiYlA9M38QjjAN5V1VKG9r2ZR9MLKuPHE4xwEXn5oFeIunP9T8g1H-UBkv5No9nAgkt_rlatEFar8SIfw==&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==) for knowingly and willfully [attempting](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe4E1d2x1lfH4iqjz9Ms4N-mTQAqztze_8bJWGOJ_yPCHXapNhisipd4U8izx2m6GZx0NzyOIqBRG4O4nOaduBmdR0PMt169UlOyxyxcKkXZHJhuJdIQCn7qn73AUiLb8Djh4bMXbYbpyJZG8AY68YIbXDneNzjJaPRo_qd6XW9uiXOJp8oHwlEIg==&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==) to alter the outcome of Georgia's 2020 election by sending voter registrations to residents of New York in an effort to register out-of-state voters - a felony offense. This isn't the first time The New Georgia Project has been caught perpetuating illegal voter fraud in Georgia. In 2014, the organization was investigated for election interference, and state leaders found them guilty of "significant illegal activities." A state probe later [confirmed](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe4_U3GksmbYnrGCcMDlZLd7pNcBvdX_Zrhxupo7CM5wMEnkvpOLSOkIb9ZY54Tpddre8_BB2WUoFOUDJhNRUDptqi0e-QJxV0n59O80XGtlMRHec5E7_9TQE3o8oFiYYf4rToTOoQRn7M=&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==) widespread fraud by the group, including forgery, after which the State Election Board unanimously [recommended](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe4ziDDQxeXRKqwbeOR5m8ZLc3LkVY80NkCIptncMCZWjC8jdcT1EqxJLoWI3SVlHwcki1TgDPziAhiILqvK6pG3in_8P5tESFUUWMqbQ896onDi5cyGgG-buFRLIQWidaYWBloeQGqCH4_bA51_D8iiRqJqUkyOoBp91SB448eUNwogFDiGb9od1ub0oT5rMf5i6-_Ql1eNZQDyn1FAcV4A5_rYIznKG12CFHR7DCMzGSFvcp4UhsU1Q==&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==) criminal charges against 17 canvassers - all under Raphael Warnock's leadership.
"For years, Raphael Warnock teamed up with Stacey Abrams, using the New Georgia Project as a cover for criminal activity to undermine the will of Georgia's voters and install radically liberal candidates through documented voter fraud," said Deputy Campaign Manager Stephen Lawson. "Now, it seems that the New Georgia Project is resuming its scheme in earnest for 2020 - because they know that as long as the playing field is level, Georgians will reject the extremist, socialist agenda of Raphael Warnock at the ballot box every time. If the media truly cares about free and fair elections, they would hold Raphael Warnock and Stacey Abrams accountable for their role in this scheme."
---
| BACKGROUND:
From 2014-2020, Warnock Served as Spokesman, CEO, and "Board Chair" of New Georgia Project, an Organization Founded by Stacey Abrams and Dedicated to Registering Minority Voters ("Massive voter registration drive in Georgia fights voter suppression," [Facing South Magazin](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe49Tf7oTtsNHauoirmfIwrmFHvwj3c7aD0H0OYRBPgfYyVTJWfFw-Yhn6gVVt2hTHssxmlGFH8E75QrdNr_c8DbSUkPHx9Gz5Pe5D-71-71EU10xT50OrA-bsecOcKCqt7w77CoPJsDlY2brBL7dLMRd6ZXjpG3aFVBwDbEvjg1eRk6UEUewDd-g==&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==)[e](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe49Tf7oTtsNHauoirmfIwrmFHvwj3c7aD0H0OYRBPgfYyVTJWfFw-Yhn6gVVt2hTHssxmlGFH8E75QrdNr_c8DbSUkPHx9Gz5Pe5D-71-71EU10xT50OrA-bsecOcKCqt7w77CoPJsDlY2brBL7dLMRd6ZXjpG3aFVBwDbEvjg1eRk6UEUewDd-g==&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==), 10/16/2014; "AJC Election Central; Voter probe ignites debate," Atlanta Journal-Constitution, 9/12/2014; New Georgia Project, Inc. Business Formation, Georgia Secretary of State Corporations Division, Filed 5/31/ 2017; New Georgia Project, Inc., 2017 Form 990, Filed 5/30/2019; "Board chair named at the New Georgia Project," [The New Georgia Project Press Release](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe4mY4hT9vvBgb_iUPjMpQ3tVary2xoWRzhb8c5vKy-M5PY89C5MvSmvKsG5NiWmI4tsgXf9jfjsKSiYI4r6SnaKL3Jxp0O8BGLATN8CZFsW0sOY0nd712tmPhz81TqsngDUUgrL578_1_DoBqvLcTd9F43z4IIhJ7MgPvStgcO_omZyC3de4D_cw==&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==), 6/8/2017)
The New Yorker Reported that Abrams Received a Salary of $177,000 as Part- Time CEO of New Georgia Project - Atlanta Journal-Constitution Reported that Abrams Had Pocketed $442,000 over Three Years from Her Nonprofits, Including New Georgia Project, and Used the Foundations to Build the Infrastructure for Her 2018 Gubernatorial Campaign In 2019, The New Yorker profiled Stacey Abrams and her fight for voting rights. The article noted that Abrams as a part-time CEO of the New Georgia Project received a salary of $177,000. In 2018, the Atlanta Journal-Constitution reported that Abrams received a total of $442,000 in compensation over three years from her non-profit foundations, including New Georgia Project, and had used the foundations to build the infrastructure for her gubernatorial campaign in 2018. ("The Vote Next Time," The New Yorker, 8/19/2019; Alan Judd, "Voter drive raised millions, but Abrams won't say from whom," [Atlanta Journal-Constitution](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe4ziDDQxeXRKqwbeOR5m8ZLc3LkVY80NkCIptncMCZWjC8jdcT1EqxJLoWI3SVlHwcki1TgDPziAhiILqvK6pG3in_8P5tESFUUWMqbQ896onDi5cyGgG-buFRLIQWidaYWBloeQGqCH4_bA51_D8iiRqJqUkyOoBp91SB448eUNwogFDiGb9od1ub0oT5rMf5i6-_Ql1eNZQDyn1FAcV4A5_rYIznKG12CFHR7DCMzGSFvcp4UhsU1Q==&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==), 9/15/2018)
George Soros and His Son, Alexander Soros, Helped Finance the New Georgia Project In October 2019, the Washington Post profiled Stacey Abrams' political career after she announced she would not run for U.S. Senate in Georgia. The article noted that billionaire Democratic mega-donor George Soros and his son Alexander Soros helped finance Abrams' New Georgia Project, stating "It drew funding from billionaire George Soros and his son Alexander, Abrams has said." ("Abrams plans her future amid pressure of expectations," Washington Post, 5/5/2019)
In September 2014, then-Georgia Secretary of State Brian Kemp Opened an Investigation into the New Georgia Project over Voter Registration Fraud Allegations - a Preliminary Inquiry Found "Significant Illegal Activities" The preliminary inquiry found "significant illegal activities" including: "forged voter registration applications, forged signatures on releases allowing for photocopying of applications, applications with inaccurate or false information, applications completed or "forged" after telephone conversations between voters and the project's representatives, voters being told they were legally required to re-register to vote, voters being told they needed to apply for a voter identification card because they could not use a driver's license when voting." ("AJC Election Central; Voter drive faces fraud allegations," Atlanta Journal-Constitution, 9/11/2014)
In September 2014, the State Election Board Agreed to Hear the Voter Registration Fraud Case - the State Probe Found 28 Forged Documents with 26 More Considered Suspicious. As part of the investigation, then-Secretary of State Brian Kemp issued a subpoena to the New Georgia Project. In September 2014, the Augusta Chronicle reported that the state probe into New Georgia Project voter registrations application found a total of 28 forged documents with 26 more considered suspicious. ("AJC Election Central; Voter registration case to be heard," Atlanta Journal-Constitution, 9/16/2014; Christina A. Cassidy, "28 forged documents uncovered in probe of Georgia voter registration group, investigator says," [Augusta Chronicle](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe4_U3GksmbYnrGCcMDlZLd7pNcBvdX_Zrhxupo7CM5wMEnkvpOLSOkIb9ZY54Tpddre8_BB2WUoFOUDJhNRUDptqi0e-QJxV0n59O80XGtlMRHec5E7_9TQE3o8oFiYYf4rToTOoQRn7M=&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==), 9/17/2014)
In September 2017, the State Election Board Unanimously Recommended Criminal Charges against 17 Former New Georgia Project Canvassers Meeting minutes from the State Election Board's September 20, 2017 meeting show that the Board unanimously voted to recommend the criminal charges against 17 former New Georgia Project canvassers. (Alan Judd, "Voter drive raised millions, but Abrams won't say from whom," [Atlanta Journal-Constitution](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe4ziDDQxeXRKqwbeOR5m8ZLc3LkVY80NkCIptncMCZWjC8jdcT1EqxJLoWI3SVlHwcki1TgDPziAhiILqvK6pG3in_8P5tESFUUWMqbQ896onDi5cyGgG-buFRLIQWidaYWBloeQGqCH4_bA51_D8iiRqJqUkyOoBp91SB448eUNwogFDiGb9od1ub0oT5rMf5i6-_Ql1eNZQDyn1FAcV4A5_rYIznKG12CFHR7DCMzGSFvcp4UhsU1Q==&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==), 9/15/2018; [State Election Board](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsACoWhrCU98uBtFptKPxoN33JRPzZo_IKAnhNLl4VWjSIVeiWqsBcMlHchCQOe4hTxmOoJN5QO9ryji9Q_fav_BBGCsgBe9jLtgzi9NhMWkexOAeS3_1TVVH1h5hQQ0LrOCMXT19ReDzW6259p4LVZjaTriI5hmz71NMwAsTk1CBHmdyNIa1lQ5Q7yNjmGkx1YcSA0pjysDAO1OMC-Crw==&c=yqlgSYOj2OFleR1gpQsLBLx74wAe-ajrm7QeACkoDAfjNKLm55Wmhw==&ch=Xd2MSEtd5RU6D6nKWlRuUKf3rhMyEYUyBg_MbKoAMOJqNvGT2r7qyw==), Item j.) SEB Case No. 2014-014 New Georgia Project - Voter Registration, Passed 5-0, 9/20/2017)
---
| ###

name: Mike Siegel
subject: Four weeks later: gratitude & the path ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress
body:
First and foremost, I want to share with you my love and gratitude. Even though we did not win this race, I’m filled with a sense of hope and optimism because of what we’ve accomplished.

|
---

| | Dear friends, I spent three years running for Congress across the Texas 10th. Alongside so many of you, I put forward a tremendous effort, to share our vision for a more progressive future, to build alliances across long-forgotten communities, and to challenge the corruption and prejudice of the existing power structure.

The work was exhausting but fruitful.

As you might imagine, I’ve spent the last few weeks since Election Day recovering, spending time with family, cleaning up my house and office and thinking a bit about what comes next.
First and foremost, I want to share with you my love and gratitude. Even though we did not win this race, I’m filled with a sense of hope and optimism because of what we’ve accomplished.
It starts with friendships. I met so many wonderful people across this district, and our staff and volunteers did the same. These relationships will continue to mature in wonderful ways.
It continues with the ideas we introduced and the conversations we advanced. On climate change and voting rights, healthcare and jobs. Discussing what real representation looks like — and how we fight for it.
We activated individuals and organizations in rural, suburban and urban communities. We wove together a network of unions and environmentalists, youth and activists, faith-based organizations and progressive institutions.
And we left the impression that even though this has been a “Republican district,” the future is uncertain, and if we continue to do this work, democratic values can prevail.
And thanks to some of our powerful victories on November 3, the work can begin right now.
Wresting control of the White House from Donald Trump was essential. On many fronts—democracy, climate, jobs, health—we now have a real opportunity to accomplish good for our country and the world.
In local campaigns here in Texas, Democrats and progressives won big. I’m most encouraged by the victory of José Garza for Travis County District Attorney. José ran on a platform of major criminal justice reform. He promised to stop prosecuting petty drug crimes that disproportionately result in the incarceration of Black and Latinx families. He is committed to holding police accountable for misconduct and re-envisioning how a prosecuting attorney advances public safety. You will be hearing a lot more about DA Garza. We know the Texas GOP will be trying to sabotage meaningful reform, and it will be up to all of us to support his work.
Of course, in Congressional races like mine, and in many Texas House races, Democrats did not succeed, and we need to understand why. I’ll be actively participating in these discussions. Texas can play a major role in developing a more just society in the years ahead, and we cannot afford to draw the wrong lessons from our defeats.
I’m working on a longer essay that I’ll share soon, but here’s my takeaway: for as close as we felt in 2018 and in 2020, believing that Democrats could “turn Texas blue,” a lot of work remains to be done. Electoral campaigns are not suited for this necessary work, however, because we are not talking about “persuading” existing voters. Instead, we need to make politics relevant for many of the people who don’t vote. Reaching these communities is essential for the future of our state, nation and planet. Without them, the status quo will prevail, to our collective peril.
On topics like this, you will see a few more messages from me as we wrap up 2020. I understand that some of you were just here for the election, and I take no offense if you unsubscribe. But because of the generous support of donors, we have built a campaign apparatus, including this email list, that I can continue to use at least until the end of the year. And there is important work to come.
Thank you for being with me on this journey.
With love and respect, Mike
---

| |
---

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Call These Senators
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=call_these_senators&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **In October, we had five Democrats on board with Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. We only needed FOUR more...and those four lost their seats in the November election.** So it's absolultey crazy today that I need you to contact Republican Senators about passing the Resolution in the Republican controlled Senate. But that's the position we're in. Let me explain. In order to STOP Walz' second lockdown from destroying more lives, we need to pass the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution in both the House and the Senate. Last month, the Republicans in the Senate wouldn't even give us a vote on the Resolution. In fact, last month they adjourned sine die before the House even took a vote on the Resolution. So if it passed in the House, it wouldn't have mattered. Our organization is willing to do the hard work and spend the resources to get those FOUR Democrats on board, but it makes no sense for us to do that when we have no assurance from the Republican Senate. That's where you come in. We need your help. In order for us to get the vote in the Senate, one courageous Republican Senator must be willing to stand up against leadership and force a vote. [Larvita was threatened with imprisonment](https://www.action4liberty.com/a_look_into_governor_walz_two_minnesotas?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=call_these_senators&n=2) by the Attorney General down in Lynd, MN. Why isn't Senator Gary Dahms standing up for his constituent and publicly stating he will force a vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers? On the other side of the state, [gym owner and Iraq war veteran Brandon Reiter](https://www.action4liberty.com/gym_owner_iraq_war_vet_defies_governor_keeps_gym_open?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=call_these_senators&n=3) is being targeted by the Attorney General's office as well for refusing to shut down his business. Why isn't Senator Mike Goggin telling his constituent that he has his back up at the Capitol? It's the least he can do for someone who risked his neck fighting for this country! Senators Dahms and Goggin need to hear from you.
### Sen Gary Dahms (Larvita's Senator)
### Call 507-641-5269, email [sen.gary.dahms@senate.mn](mailto:sen.gary.dahms@senate.mn)
### Sen Mike Goggin (Brandon's Senator)
### Call or text 651-388-1724, email [sen.mike.goggin@senate.mn ](mailto:%20sen.mike.goggin@senate.mn)
**Sample Script** : Senator _____, the Republicans in the Senate let down Minnesotans in November by refusing to vote on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution. Now we have a new lockdown by a power hungry Governor and lives are at stake. I'm demanding you stand up for your constituents by stating publicly that you will force a vote on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution in the December Special Session.**** **Alternate Script** : Senator _______, the Attorney General is targeting a business in your district who refuses to shut down due to the Governor's illegal order. You need to stand up for your constituent by forcing a vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers in the December Special Session. There's no excuse for the Republican controlled Senate to fail at passing this Resolution. It's time for you to lead. **Here's what they will say** : The Republicans in the Senate have passed the resolution 5 times, but the House won't pass it. We can't end his power unless we get the House. **Rebuttal** : In order for the Resolution to pass, it needs both the House AND Senate. Do your job to get it passed in the Senate, and we'll do our part to contact the Democrats in the House. But if you won't do that, then you're just as guilty as the Democrats for the destruction. The Governor calls you back for a Special Session for that reason. You are obligated to vote on it. Thank you in advance for reaching out to these two senators. Every time we ask for you to contact legislators, I'm humbled by how many people pick up the phone. **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=call_these_senators&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=call_these_senators&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=call_these_senators&n=6), software for leaders.

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: We’ve got to unlock this before midnight 🔓
body:
Peter, today’s the day.
It’s national Giving Tuesday, and before midnight we have major work to do. In fact, we have something to prove.
**If we can raise $50,000 in grassroots donations, we’ll be able to unlock a matching $50,000 grant from a generous donor. And, because Giving Tuesday is such an important national event, we intend to unlock this grant today. Starting right now.**
If we’re successful, that will be $100,000 for Christian voter turnout in Georgia on January 5 -- and since that’s our #1 focus, our efforts are already well underway. For example, we recently asked for volunteers to help us write and send 500,000 handwritten postcards to targeted Georgia voters. Well, we already have commitments to send nearly 1 million, and we need the resources to pay for them.
The Georgia Senate runoff elections will impact our churches' freedom to remain open, protection for the unborn, stopping the spread of socialism, the preservation of the family as God designed it, the protection of Israel, and much more.
Come next year, the U.S. Senate will be the most closely watched institution in America, and if Christians want to protect biblical values, we must send a very loud, clear message in Georgia. So let’s get started...
[**_Will you help us unlock our match with your most generous donation possible? Whether that’s $50 or $500, I humbly ask that you consider making it today._**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201201apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201201apl01nd&n=1)
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201201apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201201apl01nd&n=2)
Thank you, and we’ll be in touch later with any urgent updates.
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201201apl01nd&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201201apl01nd&n=4).

subject: Why are we short?

body:
We are thousands of dollars short of our expectations for the runoffs in Georgia. If this pattern continues, we will LOSE the Senate Majority in January.
Friend,

We are thousands of dollars short of our expectations for the runoffs in Georgia. If this pattern continues, **we will LOSE the Senate Majority in January.**

If Democrats take control, they will FLOOD America with their Socialist agenda, Friend. This means **eliminating thousands of jobs, abolishing the electoral college, and ending the filibuster.**

Republicans across the country are counting on you right now, Friend. Will you step up to **STOP** the Left from taking control?

[**TAKE A STAND - HELP NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wyFDliXudZJA5766nJEcpjPQSYgCcbsTs79_Nk9NVGWG6nSEDfUNb0fqSkcnlfFBZMuXtpV5BmDqU7gsdBrzzT6YZJpEtKu1N50CKMp7njstXnSoa1J3KppJxqmiUfNiESm4vp6TX2i5UjjkNqKwXlv5YbxatTiQRF4-zw68BEq73rvf0IBokSoJDWC4ZVPlXubpU7DYMXNi9KAY8vIsI2DtEv7feENLyhXkEYf5zZ3WmojbRFA5rRzIxT-609vxFtTFaAPA2IDY_0ipOyUIoCdOHDpyNmp8nisNqIykQtkoRTIB08liupwpC0kUxJF7P_yWwqBup8uyuU74YESVWDjKm9D0CFT4WjOI4AHt3yS2_G8Q3ozBuRllcH1UMpwKAQoeqMs_EAkTtj8C-74jU9nhH_PU7Iog5euJEmTXXYePKXBYGXYcl3LHCPXO58VC&c=nSXHH2TIuWRyMUXpBvAB6v-a_RJ4KG7Tos7HlpYpjbCIgQPWNKXa8g==&ch=Au6Nxkj3R0O0CO5dX0JLno8H24HIhEeWobUOqukjP7l3FffUUuq-Cg==)

Republican David Perdue FAILED to reach his CRITICAL November fundraising goal, meaning that Democrats have never been better positioned to FLIP GEORGIA AND TAKE BACK THE SENATE. Friend, we can't let Democrats PULL AHEAD in the most CONSEQUENTIAL Senate election in our nation's HISTORY, == == **== If Democrats manage to DEFEAT us in the fundraising race in Georgia, we will NEVER be able to catch up. That is why this goal is so important, Friend. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sCR8FQAsg946PLkRQDnsJDp7IWqqCgZgbLYAUUBp4zUZF3K-9rMEzc-BN6xQojXxcQzPQrycvpV43_scQ3b1shHjbNuMg5vdLhw3SKUrg1JLS58SSVgqiHkUYC4NClFOc1Oolt5ldB4=&c=68rNTlLRjxGQWXUi1ediV2RpUfcoSVglpvOWWo2LYZcoKyXAOyU01A==&ch=G56059GpoglegWyjTpPmJhHpPZpYP4iHk62VBZtef4uFHXNsiKSJYw==).

SENATE REPUBLICANS ****FAILED****TO REACH THEIR NOVEMBER END OF MONTH GOAL

STEP UP BEFORE THE DEADLINE EXTENSION ENDS IN:****

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YeeyAzRT6sRMH5XKOAJjpREwid03zxoChI_INgnVUAu6F5u3EYK0c3vscnalPr4vGEeqW21E0En6lYLv1UV1YL75T2ers-TgWWjskzuF038X-mRfih7ClmXCuZL_4JVMopuk-nccTu9fDM_m9P1r40hfPHQF-nCQ7ybzSgQPGGh0fFPpbTjECJ48shp9Rheyj-DDvTjpR7yhDA_wxzSc4SISjFn2eCRAHvI7dyP_0rXfNf54dc2q6sguyy1GY0G1tSNkvWxOkGqZCmNeAGtBzzvXrgss24Q_tOgwIJX-KMPEARhJLcLW2eJwym9MhNtdY9Yhs27lAk0RjFjOB5acO0EGPmJrkhqcRTn9S5Clw6rLgxh6hHbZMo-FJlGq4Klv3kZDZ6sqc6z2Xwak_bkdoeOi7v2QlKczKpQfUgZrugWkTzFjmEChSQ==&c=l0hMRfCXK59OT1D3wWh3a6oPpOJi7LMEfJsiAFbgKlZMtHSdbZ-9AQ==&ch=GeM88qpFCuQ0jyww3qmZN90fs7jayREsLiQv1-y0KQFQL0z38i3RHw==)

Friend,

We're running short on time, so I'll get right to the point -

Senate Republicans didn't reach their [**November End of Month**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YeeyAzRT6sRMH5XKOAJjpREwid03zxoChI_INgnVUAu6F5u3EYK0c3vscnalPr4vGEeqW21E0En6lYLv1UV1YL75T2ers-TgWWjskzuF038X-mRfih7ClmXCuZL_4JVMopuk-nccTu9fDM_m9P1r40hfPHQF-nCQ7ybzSgQPGGh0fFPpbTjECJ48shp9Rheyj-DDvTjpR7yhDA_wxzSc4SISjFn2eCRAHvI7dyP_0rXfNf54dc2q6sguyy1GY0G1tSNkvWxOkGqZCmNeAGtBzzvXrgss24Q_tOgwIJX-KMPEARhJLcLW2eJwym9MhNtdY9Yhs27lAk0RjFjOB5acO0EGPmJrkhqcRTn9S5Clw6rLgxh6hHbZMo-FJlGq4Klv3kZDZ6sqc6z2Xwak_bkdoeOi7v2QlKczKpQfUgZrugWkTzFjmEChSQ==&c=l0hMRfCXK59OT1D3wWh3a6oPpOJi7LMEfJsiAFbgKlZMtHSdbZ-9AQ==&ch=GeM88qpFCuQ0jyww3qmZN90fs7jayREsLiQv1-y0KQFQL0z38i3RHw==)**** goal in time, but they still have one more shot at making up the difference. body:
We have ONE more chance to stop them, and that's keeping Georgia and the Senate red. It will take every grassroots conservative doing their part to stop the millions that will be spent against us. Are you with me?
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YbXXw3WkArzpDwEYB1Rlu9OnHjhE5LHOGBUcnuet_v6Yw7wu9NxweDYSlWed2JX2DTfU5jYq4wkqs03jCCSfeuVGsPGUOKdoISVKmZmZo94iQwTX4l51OSjROIbTBPNm2VjoBZtkEqC-qptWOHoXxmlRZYY0DY1sfiZFBnaw0qD-k4RYQs9cAjdBTQrbCMdZu5lC9lW5mHS-5nQ2QrnCvaIztfNv9zJvyd0Rse2tsYWTBNt-l94iWv1SnCOg5JFeGW6QUBj58ygLaWOUqrJlyq0aFklMGMN5xs_Y6v5KCLFIC20tviEMCUYwiWYjrlanGLcTFynn04IK6bF4T_8P22EcVO3JYk0p4XatRwG_t17zB-lW37YwqbYar55hspdTwOWkac4SnbUtyoxkQtkQusg0qSxeXKcdWNv0z0Mt6w8C1T5_dP_BgiicVE9VHT8B&c=plHB5tmruBpSPPdqPUbLbQL4ItQ327HpfP1PbRQCVyhZ4LWwsSfe6w==&ch=86BLqPlG_UGmNUOKGWTTqOuG4t6sobMIMDtV8yDH8UicPg4k9LhCfw==)

Friend,

Democrats are now getting an army of socialists from California to move to Georgia and help my opponent win our U.S. Senate runoff.

**My race will decide who controls the Senate. We cannot let California socialists flip Georgia blue, giving Democrats total control.** To make this situation more dire, we are weeks away from the election, and I'm in danger of being outraised.

[**Please rush a donation today to help me fight back and keep this must-win battleground RED. ALL gifts 6x matched >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YbXXw3WkArzpDwEYB1Rlu9OnHjhE5LHOGBUcnuet_v6Yw7wu9NxweDYSlWed2JX2DTfU5jYq4wkqs03jCCSfeuVGsPGUOKdoISVKmZmZo94iQwTX4l51OSjROIbTBPNm2VjoBZtkEqC-qptWOHoXxmlRZYY0DY1sfiZFBnaw0qD-k4RYQs9cAjdBTQrbCMdZu5lC9lW5mHS-5nQ2QrnCvaIztfNv9zJvyd0Rse2tsYWTBNt-l94iWv1SnCOg5JFeGW6QUBj58ygLaWOUqrJlyq0aFklMGMN5xs_Y6v5KCLFIC20tviEMCUYwiWYjrlanGLcTFynn04IK6bF4T_8P22EcVO3JYk0p4XatRwG_t17zB-lW37YwqbYar55hspdTwOWkac4SnbUtyoxkQtkQusg0qSxeXKcdWNv0z0Mt6w8C1T5_dP_BgiicVE9VHT8B&c=plHB5tmruBpSPPdqPUbLbQL4ItQ327HpfP1PbRQCVyhZ4LWwsSfe6w==&ch=86BLqPlG_UGmNUOKGWTTqOuG4t6sobMIMDtV8yDH8UicPg4k9LhCfw==)

Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi have promised to enact their extreme agenda if they take total control:
* Packing the Supreme Court with liberal activists
* Raising taxes on hard working Americans
* Defunding the police
* Killing thousands of American jobs with the Green New Deal
* Outlawing private health insurance

**We have ONE more chance to stop them, and that 's keeping Georgia and the Senate red. ****[I need your help - Will you rush a 6x matched donation right now?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YbXXw3WkArzpDwEYB1Rlu9OnHjhE5LHOGBUcnuet_v6Yw7wu9NxweDYSlWed2JX2DTfU5jYq4wkqs03jCCSfeuVGsPGUOKdoISVKmZmZo94iQwTX4l51OSjROIbTBPNm2VjoBZtkEqC-qptWOHoXxmlRZYY0DY1sfiZFBnaw0qD-k4RYQs9cAjdBTQrbCMdZu5lC9lW5mHS-5nQ2QrnCvaIztfNv9zJvyd0Rse2tsYWTBNt-l94iWv1SnCOg5JFeGW6QUBj58ygLaWOUqrJlyq0aFklMGMN5xs_Y6v5KCLFIC20tviEMCUYwiWYjrlanGLcTFynn04IK6bF4T_8P22EcVO3JYk0p4XatRwG_t17zB-lW37YwqbYar55hspdTwOWkac4SnbUtyoxkQtkQusg0qSxeXKcdWNv0z0Mt6w8C1T5_dP_BgiicVE9VHT8B&c=plHB5tmruBpSPPdqPUbLbQL4ItQ327HpfP1PbRQCVyhZ4LWwsSfe6w==&ch=86BLqPlG_UGmNUOKGWTTqOuG4t6sobMIMDtV8yDH8UicPg4k9LhCfw==)**

subject: When is the best time to pass COVID relief? Six months ago...

body:
When is the next best time to pass COVID relief? _**Now.**_
[**Join the thousands of people who are demanding the Senate pass COVID-19 relief >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wgRR_a4v6fIIt9ICwmgh3JflmUCaZ2FeNN4ER5W_F7g=/cMG7Adx_xxriB2CUWDiOonF-hpaQ3mhodCZUwsyZIaw=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wgRR_a4v6fIIt9ICwmgh3JflmUCaZ2FeNN4ER5W_F7g=/cMG7Adx_xxriB2CUWDiOonF-hpaQ3mhodCZUwsyZIaw=)
As COVID-19 cases skyrocket across the country, we're likely going to see another round of lockdowns. That means _more_ people who will be temporarily out of work or unemployed and _more_ people who will face economic uncertainty.
Congress has an **obligation** to help people in times of crisis. That's why _in May_ , the House passed the _HEROES Act,_ which would get financial relief to millions of struggling Americans. Unfortunately, that bill has been collecting dust on Mitch McConnell's desk ever since. Enough is _**enough.**_
**[Will you stand with Linda and demand the Senate put working Americans _first_ by passing COVID-19 relief NOW?](https://act.myngp.com/el/wgRR_a4v6fIIt9ICwmgh3JflmUCaZ2FeNN4ER5W_F7g=/cMG7Adx_xxriB2CUWDiOonF-hpaQ3mhodCZUwsyZIaw=)**

Thanks for taking action,
_\-- Team S anchez_

They're locking in television ads in order to spread disgusting lies about our conservative candidates. == == == Friend, failure in Georgia is not an option. We simply can't afford to let Chuck Schumer take back control of the Senate. If he does, he'll get to work on DAY ONE to inject his liberal agenda across the nation. From packing the Supreme Court with liberal Justices to RAISING taxes, a Schumer-controlled Senate would be a NIGHTMARE for our nation, == == Thank you so much for your help, Mitch McConnell == Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate P.O. Box 661537 Miami, FL 33266 == | | Marco Rubio for Senate | 228 S WASHINGTON ST STE 115, ALEXANDRIA, VA 22314 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

Now, I’m ready to fulfill that promise. I want to know what you think my top priorities should be after I’m officially sworn in so that I can get to work on day ONE. I refuse to be just another politician, Friend. You deserve a representative who NEVER forgets who he works for... YOU. I will ALWAYS be accountable to the people I represent, and I want to do my best to fulfill that promise from my very first day on the House floor. Thank you, Byron Donalds Congressman-elect FL-19 Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress. 2430 Vanderbilt Beach Road, Ste 108 PMB 260, Naples, FL 34108

name: Roger Misso
subject: Join us in defending veterans mental health this Giving Tuesday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

For me, as a veteran, the isolation required to beat COVID-19 has made this one of the hardest years of my life. I know I'm not alone in this - and I know that those who aren't veterans feel this just as strongly, too.

As we begin the holiday season, we enter a critical time for those who struggle with mental health challenges. Last week, we asked you to join us in reaching out and thanking a veteran to help save lives. Today, on Giving Tuesday, I hope you'll go one step farther with us.

We are proud to support our brothers and sisters at [Psych Armor](https://act.myngp.com/el/zyWTcs6t55yzdeR-kiK324TLACg7OPTEI1ZhIIC1eaE=/ziL4UJk_SxoW4lWMk-PuXtuuimBt34ozUhAroSlR88A=). They are uniquely focused on providing Americans with critical resources so that they can effectively engage with and support military service members, veterans, and their families. By better educating others on the needs and lives of veterans, they are fostering stronger communities and helping empower others to bring veterans back into the fold. This is such a powerful, unique way to advance the mental health and personal fulfillment of both veterans and non-veterans alike.

[_**We are proud to match every donation today, up to $5,000, to go directly to Psych Armor. Can you chip in to help us build stronger communities, healthier veterans, and bridge the civil-military divide?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/zyWTcs6t55yzdeR-kiK324TLACg7OPTEI1ZhIIC1eaE=/oBe9cTqUUOCwodwxhEosKneyLivPARdsyGV3ND9d0j4=)

Your support means so much to me and our entire Taking the Hill family. We are all veterans here, working with each of you to help build a country where everyone recognizes their inherent value and worth. Thank you for joining us in this mission.

Yours in service,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/zyWTcs6t55yzdeR-kiK324TLACg7OPTEI1ZhIIC1eaE=/7ZP5Vgadbz_Hzk676M6e0odliVCGQRYuA6Lpne76Z88=)_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/zyWTcs6t55yzdeR-kiK324TLACg7OPTEI1ZhIIC1eaE=/dUR3sPyrzm_GKFCYvTLpdiek3R_kDENZj2XkNgbto-Q=)

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC

| **Friends,

Even though the election is now over, we are still hard at work. There are runoff elections in Georgia, state and local elections in 2021, and lots of moms getting ready to run for office.

We’re working on some exciting projects to roll out new support for moms who are thinking of running for office - from mentorship and practical advice to help getting started. Because our board is made up of moms who know what it’s like to put themselves out there, we know that it’s important to give back by lowering the barriers for those who come after us.

We have a goal to [raise $5000](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=161de217f8&e=3f151f8b74) this week - so that we can continue to help level the playing field for moms who will level the playing field for all of us.
Will you [chip in today](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=cc56f3e003&e=3f151f8b74)?

Thanks for all you do,
Elisa**

**We cannot give Democrats complete control of both the HOUSE and the SENATE and free reign of our country’s laws.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Perdue?=
subject: Team Perdue Releases New Ads Highlighting High Stakes Of Senate Race
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/874d384f0d9f/team-perdue-releases-new-ad?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| _**Team Perdue Releases New Ads Highlighting High Stakes Of Senate Race **_
Folks -

_This Friday, Vice President Pence will be back on the campaign trail in Savannah. Senator Perdue is thrilled to have the Vice President’s full support as we fight to defend the Republican Senate majority. Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=ffe511c80d&e=02cd889ad3) to get your tickets today!_
---
|
---
| **We’re excited to share our latest ads with you!**

In “[Save](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=320b8f6871&e=02cd889ad3),” Senator Perdue explains what’s at stake if the Democrats take the Senate.

National Review [previewed](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=848dd88f1e&e=02cd889ad3) the ad:

_The Republican senator and former businessman goes on to highlight a list of radical policy goals that a Democratic Senate likely would champion. “Police defunded. Taxes sky-high. Our proud military gutted,” Perdue says. “Your private health insurance taken away. Small businesses out of business. The Supreme Court packed. Is any of that really what you want?”_

_“We’re the only ones left who can stop them,” the ad concludes. “We win Georgia, we save America.”_

**Click****[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=8bc59b736e&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the ad.**
_Click_ _[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=780cda8339&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook. _
_Click[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=774ff71e56&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet._
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=eabcfae583&e=02cd889ad3 "Save")
---
| Meanwhile, Jon Ossoff continues to lie about David Perdue's aboveboard and transparent financial records by distorting facts widely reported by mainstream media. Yesterday at a press conference, he made false claims about Perdue that have been repeatedly debunked. Team Perdue released its latest television advertisement, “[Stock Lies](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=da29f5db2f&e=02cd889ad3),” to set the record straight.

[**Fox News**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=2519c57e85&e=02cd889ad3)**: Perdue says Ossoff 'can't stop lying' after Georgia Dem accuses him of profiting off coronavirus**
_On Monday, Ossoff held a press conference to blast Perdue for what he called "a pattern of misconduct and self-dealing" by his opponent, despite Perdue being cleared of wrongdoing by investigators earlier this summer. _

**Click****[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=036f20dcff&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the ad. **
_Click[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e15cd4c914&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook.
Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=8e65f9e9f9&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet._
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=46d1a11296&e=02cd889ad3 "Stock Lies")
---
| **OSSOFF SUPPORTS NATIONWIDE LOCKDOWNS → **

On [CNN](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=795b8e35e2&e=02cd889ad3), Jon Ossoff made perfectly what we already knew: his radical agenda knows no bounds. He _**supports**_ nationwide lockdowns.

Thousands of Georgia small businesses and millions of workers have been hurt by these very lockdowns. On top of that, Ossoff opposed the CARES Act which saved 1.5 million Georgia jobs! What's he got against Georgia's small businesses?

But the radicalism doesn’t end there when it comes to Ossoff.

He said he would welcome the support of Bernie Sanders. Georgia is the firewall to stop Bernie from having a partner-in-socialism in the Senate.

**Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=561cda0d2e&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch this new video exposing Ossoff’s ties to Bernie. **
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=26966d1150&e=02cd889ad3 "Embracing Socialism")
---
| _**In the News**_
---
| **NEWT GINGRICH → **
_"My message is very simple. The future of the United States depends on the outcome of the Georgia Senate races. If you don’t want a radical left-wing America dominated by left-wing judges with massive tax increases, with a policy, frankly, of appeasing China, and you don’t want that kind of future, you have to go out and vote."_
Listen to Gingrich’s interview with Breitbart News Daily [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=6465ff15c9&e=02cd889ad3).

**KEN BUCK → **
_"The contrast between the two Republican senators and the two liberal challengers is stark. Republican Sen. David Perdue is facing off against Jon Ossoff, whose policies are out of touch with Georgia. He supports major restrictions on gun ownership and sweeping new environmental regulations on businesses. Those regulations would choke the economic recovery just as it is getting started."_
Read Rep. Buck’s op-ed in the Washington Examiner [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=dba078d952&e=02cd889ad3).
###

---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=082de74e17&e=02cd889ad3 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=9d9eee5085&e=02cd889ad3 "VOLUNTEER")
---
| | _Join us at PerdueSenate.com and make this the largest grassroots effort in Georgia history to re-elect Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler._
---
| | | | | | | [](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c932c5e96e&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| | [](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=119a6b1c27&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| | [](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=48bb2d79c1&e=02cd889ad3)
---

You can [update your preferences](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3&c=4b669b6938).

name: Chris Ekstrom
subject: Something Stinks in Georgia
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gRUoRPvUlrcqI4c&b=FTBMdDKpAp0nPccpKnY7qA)
---

Hi Peter,

Christopher Ekstrom again here- the conservative, America First businessman, donor, and former Congressional candidate who is working to save the two Georgia Senate seats - but [I](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gRUoRPvUlrcqI4c&b=FTBMdDKpAp0nPccpKnY7qA) [need your help urgently to overcome the limousine liberals](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gRUoRPvUlrcqI4c&b=FTBMdDKpAp0nPccpKnY7qA)!

When our conservative candidates compete against big Hollywood money & lickspittle media support; they MUST be equipped with at least half as much ALL-AMERICAN donor support to WIN! Why can nut-job socialists like Big Stacey Abrams even compete? **Well, get a load of THIS...**

_Thanks to a $1 million contribution from billionaire mega-donor George Soros, the Georgia Democratic Party began the second half of 2018 with three times as much money in the bank as the state’s majority Republican Party, according to new campaign finance reports._

_That’s a turnaround from most recent gubernatorial election years, when the Georgia GOP had big money advantages._

**That's right - if George Soros could nearly buy the governor's mansion for a nut job like Stacey Abrams, he can certainly buy a couple of Senate seats. The problem in 2018 was the Democrats outspent us! That's why we cannot let them outspend us again!**

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gRUoRPvUlrcqI4c&b=FTBMdDKpAp0nPccpKnY7qA)
---

_As a conservative, America First donor myself, I know how important it is to not get killed in the money race in politics. You can't let your liberal opponent have three times as much money as you, and reasonably expect to win!_

Soros has bulked up the Georgia Dems. They are awash in dirty money, and are using it to flip these two U.S. Senate seats!

If the President's legal team can't expose the truth behind his election, _then the Senate will be the only check on Joe Biden and his puppet-master Kamala Harris_ \- and we need to make sure we take BOTH Georgia seats to give Mitch McConnell the ability to stop the Squad's agenda!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gRUoRPvUlrcqI4c&b=FTBMdDKpAp0nPccpKnY7qA)
---

**You have to understand - our Senators are getting outspent by Soros and Bloomberg with all of their Communist Chinese money! **

They already nearly bought the Georgia governor's race. They are financing the steal of the Presidential election too!

They are trying to buy these two U.S. Senate seats- and they will succeed if we can't get Loeffler and Purdue some help!

This is no joke - the AOC agenda will be federal policy if we don't win these Georgia races! We need a Senate firewall - it is so important.

Soros, Hollywood, Bloomberg, and other far-left crazies are dumping millions into this election. [That means we must step up and meet the challenge.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gRUoRPvUlrcqI4c&b=FTBMdDKpAp0nPccpKnY7qA)

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gRUoRPvUlrcqI4c&b=FTBMdDKpAp0nPccpKnY7qA)
---

According to Opensecrets.org, big extreme liberal interests from around the country- not from GA- have bolstered both Democrat Warnock against Loeffler, and Democrat Ossoff against Purdue:

_Thanks to a surge of out-of-state donors in the third quarter, Warnock, a minister, raised $21.7 million. Unlike Loeffler, Warnock did not spend his own money. He was most helped by out-of-state donors, who accounted for almost 80 percent of his funds, and outside spending groups, which spent $5.2 million to help the Democrat make the runoff after winning a plurality of the vote._

_Perdue maintained a fundraising lead over Ossoff until the third quarter, when the Democrat raised a whopping $21.3 million. Overall, Ossoff raised $32.3 million through mid-October, with nearly 40 percent coming from small donors. Like Warnock, Ossoff’s funds come primarily from out-of-state donors. The documentary filmmaker had $4.2 million left in mid-October._

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gRUoRPvUlrcqI4c&b=FTBMdDKpAp0nPccpKnY7qA)
---

Drain the DC Swamp PAC has helped good America-First conservatives like you and me for years, providing vital cover when Soros and Bloomberg start trying to bury conservatives with their billions.

**My friends at Drain the DC Swamp PAC are working overtime to even out the money disadvantage. Our GA Senate candidates are doing great, but they need our help! [Can you help?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gRUoRPvUlrcqI4c&b=FTBMdDKpAp0nPccpKnY7qA)**

_We cannot afford to lose either one of these races! The Democrats running are among the most extreme and crazy we've ever seen. Plus they will let New York's Chuck Schumer create havoc with our money and our liberties!_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Genevieve=20Collins?=
subject: Thank you and Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,

I hope you and your family had a wonderful and safe Thanksgiving. This time of year always reminds me of how thankful I am to have such amazing friends, supporters and family in my life. And to that end, I want to personally thank you for investing in me and my campaign. Unfortunately the election results did not come out in our favor, but I don’t look at this as a loss. In reality, I am incredibly humbled and honored to have had you by my side during these last 18 months. Can you believe what we have all lived through?! I’ve met so many remarkable, kind, intelligent and caring people in our community and country...each a true blessing. I am so thankful and more importantly grateful for your fierce support of me and my campaign.
While right now I do not know everything that the future has in store, what I know for sure is that I am going to stay engaged and involved in the political process. Our country and state are worth fighting for and I believe that First Lady Barbara Bush said it best speaking at Fort Campbell in February 1991: “America stands for — courage, compassion, commitment and spirit.” This election showed me that all of our supporters don’t just believe the same, but live it fully, with conviction daily. As I promised many of you, I won’t let you down and I stand by that promise. You, Texas and America are absolutely worth fighting for and God will reveal His plan soon for all of us.

I wish you and your family a wonderful holiday season! May you be surrounded by the people you care about most. May you stay safe from the Coronavirus. May you feel the joy and hope of what 2021 will bring. And may you know from the bottom of my heart how grateful I am for you.

Happy holidays and many blessings to you and your family!
---
| With all my love,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins
---

Friend, The race for NY-22 has come down to a razor-thin margin: only **12 votes** separate Anthony Brindisi and I. That’s right – this isn’t a margin of thousands or even hundreds of votes but a mere 12 votes. That is why the fight for NY-22 continues on. **When 1 or 2 ballots could make the difference in this race, we can’t stop fighting for fairness and transparency in the counting of ballots until we know for sure that we won.** _**[Can I count on you to help us get to the finish line?](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=168cf5e0b69b4ceaa3a4d0f835b297c5&_e=P1QqaSY2MxD9J3FFyr_NnXFjYC5npTxCzZ7vojP2xJX3uMXA7Qvvtbia79qriBo03afHpyxsx-7vRuqQEAHIQ9jHuEGaJh8bbg8tQ7MOS6zGb6M2_-4svw4DZgOEJfKo_n3L58MMomw0SBq-KhtAen_Ntv1dBhcMV0RmhJtW9cD67yBxjx73EfyBeFTvRqH-bqYN84Lo9v-tnHI99b7UaABK7RHiP84JozFdCrmF7L3S8FUV_5imdUEeHzJO7uE0ZYHKQ9VrISuPhaQHOgbkMKHGN2d8Yx4BHGRhKJlVlEo28iphww74XO8xgLhqA3Q4HO8xV-F3M53PNWocdzG97KH0RnVlMxE2AlkfRK9RzmHpi93_ZEpU6wz0tNrPetNv7UpsztvN2sPs1luw48O3WfUHuWEiFhU0bfzDBVxCxFBDknv6vK7_KeqyRLfj_zJbEFb6wpP3g62ngk3tCKKeslwXjFi6PeiATtMkkIUbk9I%3D)**_ Friend, we knew at the start of this campaign that winning wouldn’t be easy. We knew that unimaginable challenges would come our way and that we would have to be ready to go the extra mile at all times in order to take back our district. Now is one of those extraordinary times, and I need you by my side. **[Can you rush a donation to help us ensure every legal vote is name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Guess what?
body:
Peter,
Guess what?
We are extremely close to unlocking a crucial $50,000 matching grant for the Georgia runoff.
We still need to reach our goal before midnight and I’m hoping you can help get us there.
Jason Yates did a great job explaining our big Giving Tuesday goal, so I’m including his earlier email below.
[**_Please have a look and consider making your biggest donation today before midnight._**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201201apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201201apl01ndpm&n=1)
Thank you and God bless you.
-Gov. Huckabee
\------------------------------------------------------
**From:** Jason Yates
**Sent:** Tuesday, December 1, 2020
******To:** Mike Huckabee
**Subject:** We’ve got to unlock this before midnight 🔓
Mike,
It’s national Giving Tuesday, and before midnight we have major work to do. In fact, we have something to prove.
**If we can raise $50,000 in grassroots donations, we’ll be able to unlock a matching $50,000 grant from a generous donor. And, because Giving Tuesday is such an important national event, we intend to unlock this grant today. Starting right now.**
If we’re successful, that will be $100,000 for Christian voter turnout in Georgia on January 5 -- and since that’s our #1 focus, our efforts are already well underway. For example, we recently asked for volunteers to help us write and send 500,000 handwritten postcards to targeted Georgia voters. Well, we already have commitments to send nearly 1 million, and we need the resources to pay for them.
The Georgia Senate runoff elections will impact our churches' freedom to remain open, protection for the unborn, stopping the spread of socialism, the preservation of the family as God designed it, the protection of Israel, and much more.
Come next year, the U.S. Senate will be the most closely watched institution in America, and if Christians want to protect biblical values, we must send a very loud, clear message in Georgia. So let’s get started...
[**_Will you help us unlock our match with your most generous donation possible? Whether that’s $50 or $500, I humbly ask that you consider making it today._**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201201apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201201apl01ndpm&n=2)
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201201apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201201apl01ndpm&n=3)
Thank you, and we’ll be in touch later with any urgent updates.
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201201apl01ndpm&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201201apl01ndpm&n=5).

We still need to reach our goal before midnight and I’m hoping you can help get us there. Jason Yates did a great job explaining our big Giving Tuesday goal, so I’m including his earlier email below. Thank you and God bless you. -Gov. Huckabee \------------------------------------------------------ From: Jason Yates Sent: Tuesday, December 1, 2020 ****To: Mike Huckabee Subject: We’ve got to unlock this before midnight 🔓 Mike, It’s national Giving Tuesday, and before midnight we have major work to do. In fact, we have something to prove. If we can raise $50,000 in grassroots donations, we’ll be able to unlock a matching $50,000 grant from a generous donor. And, because Giving Tuesday is such an important national event, we intend to unlock this grant today. Starting right now. If we’re successful, that will be $100,000 for Christian voter turnout in Georgia on January 5 -- and since that’s our #1 focus, our efforts are already well underway. For example, we recently asked for volunteers to help us write and send 500,000 handwritten postcards to targeted Georgia voters. Well, we already have commitments to send nearly 1 million, and we need the resources to pay for them. The Georgia Senate runoff elections will impact our churches' freedom to remain open, protection for the unborn, stopping the spread of socialism, the preservation of the family as God designed it, the protection of Israel, and much more. Come next year, the U.S. Senate will be the most closely watched institution in America, and if Christians want to protect biblical values, we must send a very loud, clear message in Georgia. So let’s get started... Thank you, and we’ll be in touch later with any urgent updates. United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO ©2020 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
